attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 49 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (from CDV-036) - maintainer to confirm/reassign within SPEC-VASC-03 bucket

specialty VASC (peripheral vascular vasospastic disorder); difficulty_tier red_herring_laden (03), diagnosis_category common - benign vasospasm presenting as feared critical digital ischaemia/embolism
Raynaud's SNOMED 266261006 and secondary-Raynaud's/differential codes are best-effort CANDIDATES - to be verified by the terminology server
age not stated in source - schema requires demographics.age; provisional age 40 (age_band 'adult') used as a conservative placeholder, flagged for clinician confirmation/reassignment

sex not stated - schema requires demographics.sex_at_birth (enum male/female/intersex, no not-specified value); provisionally set 'female' (primary Raynaud's is more common in females) purely for schema conformance, flagged for clinician confirmation
next of kin not specified (patient only at visit) - contact_nok relationship 'not_specified', available false
no allergies or family history volunteered in source - allergies_as_reported [] and family_history_as_reported [] left empty, not fabricated
empty risk_scores - no formal validated risk score constructable for an acute Raynaud's attack; omitted rather than fabricated
no guideline citation in source - guidelines_referenced [] left empty

telehealth reprojection applied - in-person after-hours home visit with vitals, pulse palpation, capillary refill and viability exam reprojected to telehealth_chat; normal bilateral pulses/brisk capillary refill/no-necrosis sealed to 10 (RF-003) and 11 (SYM-007, requires_physical_examination); video-observable finger colour/warmth retained in 01.objective_data_offered (verified false)

recently commenced beta-blocker (migraine prophylaxis) recorded in 12 with necessity should_NOT_recommend and a medication_review behavioural action (raise urgently with GP, do not stop unsupervised) - NO dose fabricated (source gives none)
simple analgesia (paracetamol/ibuprofen) recommended_first_line - standard OTC dosing per label, no specific dose fabricated

baseline tier T3 (urgent same-day in-person perfusion confirmation) chosen as conservative but non-over-triaged: resolving, viable, bilateral vasospasm makes T4/T5 over-triage, but inability to palpate pulses over telehealth makes pure remote reassurance (T0/T1) unsafe under-triage; minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2; ESC-001 T4/ED for persistent white-numb/blackening digit, ESC-002 T5/000 for single cold pulseless limb
presentation layer de-anchored - no diagnosis name, triage tier or red-flag labelling leaked into 00/01/02; source filename recorded only in case_manifest.source.filename

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
